response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across 15+ years, with direct alignment to the role's core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). Her work includes high-scale systems (millions of requests/sec), AI-agent infrastructure, and enterprise tooling, with measurable impact in optimizing performance and scalability. Leadership in open-source projects and mentorship further validate her technical depth and collaboration skills.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with exact stack match (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest)
Proven track record scaling systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec, pricing optimizations)
Relevant AI-agent infrastructure and cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
concerns: Limited recent experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL (required skill)
Primary focus on backend/DevOps may require ramp-up for frontend-heavy features

key_factors.factor: Exact stack match (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest)
Scaling and performance experience at enterprise level
